# Gradient Flow Analysis v46

## Architecture
ResNet-152

## Flow Metrics
- Vanishing gradient score: 0.194
- Exploding gradient score: 0.547
- Effective depth: 48 layers

## Optimizations Applied
- Residual connections
- Skip connections
- Residual connections
- Gradient clipping
- Layer normalization
- Residual connections

## Recommendation
Add auxiliary losses for intermediate supervision.
